title: Italian Ham and Puff Pastry
description: A classic Italian pastry dish featuring ham and puff pastry, easy to make and delicious.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry and cut into 12 equal squares.
Place a slice of Parma ham and a slice of ham in the center of each square.
Fold the pastry squares in half to enclose the filling and press the edges to seal.
Place the pastries on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with butter and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
